name: Tsunami
description: Google's extensible network security scanner for high-severity vulnerabilities. Tool: https://github.com/google/tsunami-security-scanner. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #32 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Tsunami output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Tsunami output file to parse instead of running it live.
